name: Cheesy Apple Ham Grill
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Miracle Whip or Miracle Whip Light Dressing, divided
4 slices Kraft Natural Sharp Cheddar Cheese, cut in half
1 package Oscar Mayer Smoked Cooked Ham Slices (6 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix apples with 1/3 cup of the dressing, walnuts, and ground cloves.
2. Assemble each sandwich: place one bread slice on top of one cheese slice, followed by the apple mixture, ham, another cheese slice, and finally, a second bread slice.
3. Spread any remaining dressing on the outside edges of the sandwiches.
4. Grill until both sides are lightly browned.
Makes 4 sandwiches.
